full_text:
Lu Xi (Gongzhong) 陸喜 (恭仲)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lu Xi (陸喜), styledGongzhong (恭仲), was born in Wu. Famous as a youth and would review literary works, resigned when Wu fell. Lu Xi was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty.
